stories.title: Vertu 推出 6880 美元 AI 智能体，实测表现如何？
stories.sourceTitle: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
stories.summary: TechCrunch 实测了 Vertu 的奢华折叠手机内置的 AI 智能体，考察其工作流、电池续航和安全性。
stories.analysis: 高价 AI 智能体能否兑现生产力承诺仍需市场检验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

stories.title: Databricks 估值达 1880 亿美元，巩固 AI 领域第二曲线地位
stories.sourceTitle: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
stories.summary: Databricks 通过转型为 AI 公司并发布开源权重模型编码成本节约研究，估值达到 1880 亿美元。
stories.analysis: AI 基础设施公司估值膨胀，但盈利能力仍是长期考验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

stories.title: TikTok 测试 AI 形象检测工具，帮助创作者识别伪造内容
stories.sourceTitle: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
stories.summary: TikTok 开始测试一项可选工具，扫描 AI 生成的相似形象并允许创作者举报，目前向部分美国创作者开放。
stories.analysis: 平台主动治理 AI 深度伪造，但覆盖范围和准确性有待观察。
stories.sourceExcerpt: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US spokesperson Zachary

stories.title: Zoom 漏洞：如何让会议不被录制？
stories.sourceTitle: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
stories.summary: 文章探讨当所有对话都被转录和总结后，谁会真正阅读这些记录，并提出一种避免被录制的 Zoom 技巧。
stories.analysis: 这更像是一篇反思 AI 过度记录隐私的评论，而非实用漏洞。
stories.sourceExcerpt: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

stories.title: Agility Robotics 在特斯拉后院开设 Digit 机器人训练中心
stories.sourceTitle: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
stories.summary: Agility Robotics 在加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特开设新的 Digit 机器人培训中心，直接选址在特斯拉附近。
stories.analysis: 人形机器人竞赛加剧，Agility 意图争夺特斯拉的本地人才和市场。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

stories.title: AI 驱动的内存短缺冲击印度智能手机市场
stories.sourceTitle: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
stories.summary: 印度智能手机市场因 AI 对内存需求激增导致供应紧张，影响定价、需求和企业策略。
stories.analysis: AI 硬件需求正在重塑消费电子供应链格局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.

stories.title: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，指控其窃取商业机密
stories.sourceTitle: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
stories.summary: 苹果对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控其系统性地挖走 400 多名苹果员工并窃取技术机密，但专家质疑部分指控的合理性。
stories.analysis: 苹果意在通过法律战遏制 OpenAI 发展，但诉讼可能削弱 OpenAI IPO 计划。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight

stories.title: 苹果诉讼可能扰乱 OpenAI 的 IPO 计划
stories.sourceTitle: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
stories.summary: 苹果上周五起诉 OpenAI 窃取商业机密，指控涉及硬件主管和大量前员工，可能影响 OpenAI 的上市进程。
stories.analysis: 诉讼时机对 OpenAI 极为不利，潜在法律风险将吓退投资者。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at th

stories.title: OpenAI CFO 提出 AI 计分卡：衡量 ROI 的新框架
stories.sourceTitle: A scorecard for the AI age
stories.summary: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 介绍了一个实用 AI 计分卡，通过有用工作、每次成功任务成本、可靠性和计算回报衡量 ROI。
stories.analysis: 这个框架旨在帮助企业理性评估 AI 投资，避免盲目投入。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

stories.title: Patreon 不再请求 AI 机器人停止抓取，转而直接屏蔽
stories.sourceTitle: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
stories.summary: Patreon 与 Cloudflare 合作，加强防御 AI 抓取，从依赖 robots.txt 转向主动屏蔽未经授权的数据采集。
stories.analysis: 内容平台正从礼貌请求转向技术对抗，保护创作者权益。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unaut

stories.title: 苹果诉讼选在 OpenAI 最糟糕的时机
stories.sourceTitle: Apple’s lawsuit couldn’t come at a worse time for OpenAI
stories.summary: 苹果起诉 OpenAI 的时机恰逢 OpenAI 准备 IPO 以及面临其他监管挑战，可能造成重大打击。
stories.analysis: 法律与商业双重压力下，OpenAI 的上市前景蒙上阴影。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at th

stories.title: GPU 融资者转向推理芯片：4 亿美元交易揭示 AI 基础设施新趋势
stories.sourceTitle: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
stories.summary: 一笔 4 亿美元的芯片抵押贷款表明，AI 基础设施投资者正从 GPU 转向专用的推理芯片。
stories.analysis: 推理芯片的金融化意味着 AI 部署成本结构正在发生根本变化。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

stories.title: 纽约州长用 AI 分析该州所有法规
stories.sourceTitle: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
stories.summary: 纽约州长 Kathy Hochul 表示其团队正在使用 AI 分析该州每一条规则，尽管她刚签署了暂停新建 AI 数据中心的法案。
stories.analysis: 政府自身拥抱 AI，但对其基础设施扩张保持谨慎，政策矛盾值得关注。
stories.sourceExcerpt: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze

stories.title: AI 执法：数字时代警务的未来
stories.sourceTitle: Computer cops
stories.summary: 作者在德克萨斯州沃斯堡参加一场被称为'数字时代警务未来'的展览，但作为记者被禁止入场，从外部观察了活动。
stories.analysis: AI 在警务中的应用引发透明度与公民自由争议。
stories.sourceExcerpt: I stood before a hulking glass and brick structure in the heart of Fort Worth, Texas. Thousands gathered inside to see what had been billed as "the future of policing in the digital age." As press, I was prohibited from entering, but from a number of nearby lo

stories.title: xAI 起诉一名男子使用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待深度伪造
stories.sourceTitle: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
stories.summary: xAI 起诉南卡罗来纳州男子 Terry Wayne Harwood，指控其故意使用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待材料。
stories.analysis: AI 公司开始对恶意用户采取法律行动，但预防措施仍是关键。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Gr

stories.title: AI 烂片成为新的直接视频赚钱方式
stories.sourceTitle: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
stories.summary: 在《奥德赛》等大片上映的同时，大量 AI 生成的劣质电影正通过低成本吸引观众，就像过去的直接视频电影一样。
stories.analysis: AI 降低了电影制作门槛，但内容质量参差不齐可能损害观众信任。
stories.sourceExcerpt: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to

stories.title: Suno 被抓取 YouTube 等平台数百万首歌曲训练模型
stories.sourceTitle: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
stories.summary: 根据黑客泄露的数据，AI 音乐生成器 Suno 从 YouTube Music、Deezer 和 Genius 抓取了数百万首歌曲和歌词进行训练。
stories.analysis: 训练数据版权问题再次凸显，Suno 面临法律风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revea

stories.title: OpenAI 为青少年提供安全 AI：年龄保护、学习工具与家长控制
stories.sourceTitle: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
stories.summary: OpenAI 正在为 ChatGPT 引入年龄适宜的保护措施、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作，使青少年能安全使用 AI。
stories.analysis: 这是 OpenAI 拓展年轻用户市场并回应监管压力的举措。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

stories.title: Cars24 借助 OpenAI 实现每月 100 万分钟语音对话
stories.sourceTitle: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
stories.summary: Cars24 使用 OpenAI 驱动的语音和聊天代理处理每月超过 100 万分钟对话，挽回 12% 的流失线索，并加快开发速度。
stories.analysis: AI 客服在垂直领域的落地效果显著，但定制化需求高。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

stories.title: 德国电信如何利用 OpenAI 重构电信业务
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: 德国电信正在与 OpenAI 合作，将 AI 应用于客户服务、员工工作流、网络运营和语音服务，向 AI 原生运营商转型。
stories.analysis: 大型电信运营商全面拥抱 AI，可能改变行业服务标准。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: OpenAI 与沃尔顿家族基金会合作，帮助 K-12 教师掌握 AI 技能
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: OpenAI Academy 和沃尔顿家族基金会推出 AI Skills Jams，帮助 K-12 教育工作者在课堂上构建实用 AI 技能。
stories.analysis: AI 教育普及从教师培训开始，有助于培养下一代 AI 素养。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 推进 AI 原生组织转型
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI 原生组织，改进工作流并推出新的 AI 金融服务。
stories.analysis: 金融巨头的 AI 转型案例表明，企业级 ChatGPT 正渗透核心业务。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 发布 GeneBench-Pro，评估基因相关 AI 能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: OpenAI 推出 GeneBench-Pro 基准测试，使用复杂真实世界数据集评估 AI 在基因组学、生物学和科学研究中的表现。
stories.analysis: 专业领域基准测试的推出有助于量化 AI 的科研价值。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro 的生命科学评测方法
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: 本文深入介绍 GeneBench-Pro 的设计思路和数据集，展示如何评估 AI 在生命科学领域的表现。
stories.analysis: 对于从事 AI 药物研发和基因组学的研究者，这是重要的参考基准。

stories.title: OpenAI 通过 core dump 分析修复 18 年老 bug
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI 工程师通过大规模 core dump 分析，发现并修复了一个同时涉及硬件故障和长期软件 bug 的罕见基础设施崩溃问题。
stories.analysis: 展示了 AI 辅助调试在复杂基础设施中的潜力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: PPIO发布智能模型网关，打造面向Agent时代的智能Token工厂
stories.sourceTitle: PPIO发布智能模型网关，打造面向Agent时代的智能Token工厂
stories.summary: 量子位报道：PPIO 发布智能模型网关，经过万亿 Token 调用验证，旨在为 Agent 时代提供智能 Token 工厂。
stories.analysis: 模型网关作为 AI 基础设施的关键组件，将随着 Agent 应用普及而需求增长。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 万亿Token调用量验证

stories.title: DA-Nav实现机器人“偏航自纠偏”：找回路线成功率达98%
stories.sourceTitle: DA-Nav实现机器人“偏航自纠偏”：找回路线成功率达98%
stories.summary: InfoQ 中文报道：DA-Nav 实现了机器人在偏航后自我纠偏，找回原路线的成功率达到 98%。
stories.analysis: 这项技术对自主导航机器人（如物流、清洁机器人）的可靠性有重要提升。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：Token 流实时安全防护
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 博客宣布推出 Qwen3Guard，这是 Qwen 系列首个安全护栏模型，基于 Qwen3 微调，专门用于安全分类。
stories.analysis: 开源模型的安全机制日益重要，Qwen3Guard 为开发者提供了开箱即用的防护选项。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
